name: Peach Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups fresh or well drained canned peaches, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine dry ingredients: flour, salt, baking soda, and sugar. Make a well in the center of the mix.
2. Add eggs and oil to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients: peaches, vanilla, almond extract (if using), and almonds (if using).
4. Spoon 1/3 cup batter into greased muffin tins.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the muffins are done.
